overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a medieval stone town at sunset. The character proceeds through castle gates, along waterfront paths, and transitions from urban stone architecture to natural outdoor environments.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval town square approaching castle gate

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily through the town square toward the main castle gate, swords visible on his back

notable_agents.action: guard in red tunic standing near the gate entrance holding a torch

entered.detail: large stone archway entrance with thick walls and metal portcullis structure
tall cylindrical medieval tower with conical roof and crenellations
uneven cobblestone road surface with grass growing between stones

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a medieval town square at sunset, approaching a large stone castle gate. The cobblestone street is lined with timber-framed buildings, and a guard stands watch near the entrance as the sun casts long orange shadows across the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered stone gate tunnel with torch lighting

events.description: entering the stone archway gate from the town square into the covered tunnel
ambient light drops significantly as moving deeper into the stone tunnel, becoming torch-lit

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the stone gate tunnel, passing guards holding torches on the walls

notable_agents.action: guard holding a torch standing against the tunnel wall, illuminated by firelight

entered.detail: thick stone archway forming the gate passage with rough brick walls

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a narrow stone tunnel as Geralt passes through the town gate. Torchlight flickers on the rough stone walls, casting dramatic shadows, while guards stand watch along the passage. The environment shifts from open sky to enclosed shelter.

scene_state.functional_zone: harbor waterfront path with wooden merchant buildings

events.description: exiting the tunnel into an open harbor area with wooden buildings and water visible
character turns right to follow the waterfront path alongside wooden structures

agents.ego_description: Geralt exits the gate and turns right along the waterfront path, passing wooden carts and barrels near the water

notable_agents.action: guard standing near a wooden post overlooking the water, holding a polearm

entered.detail: dark timber-framed building with wooden stairs and platforms
wooden pier structure extending over the water with posts visible
wooden wheelbarrow or cargo cart sitting on the path

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the tunnel, Geralt turns right into a harbor waterfront area. Wooden merchant buildings line the left side while the water stretches to the right. The path is cluttered with wooden carts, barrels, and burning braziers as the sunset illuminates the scene from behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark stone underpass tunnel with ascending stairs

events.description: entering a second dark stone tunnel with ascending stairs leading upward
environment becomes very dark with only wall torchlight illuminating the stone surfaces

agents.ego_description: Geralt climbing worn stone stairs through a dark tunnel passage toward the light at the far end

entered.detail: low stone archway leading to a dark tunnel with brick walls
worn stone steps ascending through the tunnel toward daylight

segments.scene_description: The scene shifts to a dark, enclosed stone underpass as Geralt ascends a flight of stairs. The tunnel is dimly lit by wall torches, with rough brick archways overhead. The character moves from the open waterfront into this narrow passage, heading toward a bright exit visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: natural trail outside town walls with forest and sunset view

events.description: exiting the tunnel into an open natural area with trees and full sunset sky visible
approaching a campsite with burning brazier and wooden structures

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along a dirt path surrounded by trees and bushes, heading toward a distant campfire in the wilderness

entered.detail: leafy green deciduous trees lining both sides of the dirt path
burning fire pit with orange flames and smoke rising
low mossy stone wall running alongside the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: Geralt emerges from the tunnel into a natural outdoor setting with the sunset sky fully visible. The path winds through trees and vegetation, transitioning from the stone architecture of the town to a wilderness environment. A campfire burns in the distance as the character continues along the dirt trail.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a bustling medieval town square into a secluded natural wilderness under a sunset sky. It begins on a cobblestone street lined with timber-framed buildings, moving toward a large stone castle gate as long orange shadows stretch across the ground. As the camera passes through the gate, the open sky vanishes and the scene shifts into a narrow stone tunnel illuminated by flickering torchlight before emerging into a harbor waterfront filled with wooden merchant buildings, carts, and burning braziers. The path then turns back into a dimly lit stone underpass, ascending a flight of stairs through rough brick archways toward a distant light. Finally, the camera exits the enclosure into an outdoor setting where the stone architecture gives way to a dirt trail winding through trees and vegetation toward a distant campfire.
